basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Admin. Associate Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website www.iimk.ac.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduation with minimum two years' of experience OR Graduation with minimum three years' of experience in Clerical duties/ office administration. Proficiency in MS-Office, internet usage, online meeting tools, good communication in English and Hindi, and drafting skills.
qualification.details: Admin. Associate: Post-Graduation with a minimum of two years' of experience in Clerical duties/office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Govt./Private Organization. OR Graduation with a minimum of three years' of experience in Clerical duties/office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Govt./Private Organization. In addition, candidates should be proficient in MS-Office (word, excel, power point etc.), internet usage, Zoom or any online meeting tools. They should also possess good communication proficiency in English (Both written and verbal) and Hindi, and have drafting skills.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate posts is 02 July 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Admin. Associate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Admin. Associate position in the Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Admin. Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have either a Post-Graduation with two years of experience or a Graduation with three years of experience in clerical or office administration roles. Proficiency in MS-Office and good communication skills are also essential.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Admin. Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Admin. Associate post is 35 years. There is no minimum age specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Admin. Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Admin. Associate position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 24300 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Admin. Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Admin. Associate posts will involve a Skill Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Admin. Associate position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Official Notification PDF" link provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate recruitment must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.
